product_results.title: etguuds 3ft Car Carplay Cable for iPhone 17/17 Pro Max/17 Air/16/16 Pro Max/16 Plus/15 Plus, USB to USB C Cable Compatible with Apple Car Play iPhone 16 15 Cord - 2 Pack USB A to USB C Charger Cord

summary.text: Customers find this electronic cable works perfectly and functions excellently as a charger. They describe it as a good quality product with good length that is perfect for their needs. The cable demonstrates durability, being very durable and solid around the charging C port. Customers also appreciate its compatibility, though they have mixed opinions about the charging speed.

authors_reviews.title: Works with carplay
authors_reviews.text: Really liked these cables. Quality seems fine and they work well with apple carplay. Not sure about fast charging, i only got them with the intention of connecting to my car's carplay and for that, these are awesome.
